provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and cultural detail, visible brushstrokes, Mire flowing through a hull breach to repair it from inside — the mass of cells squeezing through a gap too small for any solid organism, individual cells visible as translucent green-grey slugs, reforming on the far side into working arms that patch the breach with sealant, a Sable Reach crew member watching through a viewport, the practical reality of expendable alien labor
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine, heroic pose, action scene, combat, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, cute, chibi

judgment.explanation: Rendered as military cockpit scene — no Mire organism flowing through hull breach. Complete concept miss.
